hero.title: About PVCON
hero.subtitle: PVCON is a premier global leader in independent GxP Auditing, Pharmacovigilance Consulting, Professional Training, and Quality Services. It supports pharmaceutical, biotechnology, CRO, and medical device organizations across 100+ countries as a trusted One-Stop Partner.

images.aboutAlt: PVCON pharmacovigilance consulting team in a professional setting
images.teamAlt: PVCON consultants collaborating on regulatory strategy

story.p1: PVCON is a premier global provider of independent GxP Auditing, Pharmacovigilance Consulting, and Professional Training services, supporting pharmaceutical, biotechnology, and medical device organizations across 100+ countries.
story.p2: Recognized for its integrity, independence, and technical excellence, PVCON serves as a trusted "One-Stop Partner" for comprehensive Pharmacovigilance Audit and Quality solutions, helping clients navigate complex regulatory landscapes with confidence.
story.p3: PVCON was founded by globally respected Pharmacovigilance expert Moin Don, Executive Director, whose leadership and deep industry expertise have shaped the organization into a reliable strategic partner for companies seeking compliance excellence and inspection readiness.

approach.heading: A Strategic Compliance Partner
approach.p1: Meet the people and global network behind PVCON — driving pharmacovigilance excellence through 100+ countries across 6 continents
approach.p2: PVCON was founded by globally respected Pharmacovigilance Expert of over 50+ years Moin Don, the Founder & CEO whose leadership and deep industry expertise shaped the organization into a reliable strategic partner, known for being an Advisor to India's Drug Controller General (PvPI) and Speaker at prominent industry forums such as DIA, RQA, UMC.
approach.p3: PVCON is more than just a service provider; we are a strategic compliance partner. Not simply supporting pharmacovigilance activities; we architect regulator-confident PV systems that drive patient safety, operational excellence, quality assurance and long-term compliance sustainability, with rigorous audit frameworks, comprehensive training programs, and proactive strategies aligned with current ICH, GVP, and global GxP guidelines.

intro.p1: In an increasingly complex and highly regulated GxP landscape, compliance is not just about meeting requirements — it is about building resilient systems that protect patients, safeguard brands, and withstand regulatory scrutiny. PVCON is designed to be your strategic partner in achieving operational excellence, inspection confidence, and sustainable compliance maturity.
intro.p2: We leverage deep pharmacovigilance expertise, regulatory intelligence, audit proficiency, and practical implementation experience to deliver regulator-ready solutions.

01.title: BEST IN CLASS AUDITORS & CONSULTANTS
01.description: 300+ man-years of experience with leading pharma companies, CROs and PV service providers. Auditors with regulatory experience spanning across global regulators like MHRA, EMA, US FDA, DCGI, BoMRA, etc. and with multilingual capabilities, our independent Consultants are positioned globally, for effectively facilitated audits.

02.title: INTEGRATED STRATEGIC PARTNERSHIP ECOSYSTEM
02.description: Comprehensive pharmacovigilance solutions spanning operations, audits, governance, inspection readiness, and training. Our integrated approach ensures every component of your PV system works in harmony. Acting as an extension of your team, our consultants prioritize knowledge transfer to help you build robust, sustainable internal capabilities.

03.title: RISK-BASED, INSPECTION-READY APPROACH
03.description: Compliance strategies built for audit resilience and regulator confidence. We design risk-based frameworks that prioritize critical compliance areas, prepare teams through mock inspections, and establish CAPA processes demonstrating sustained regulatory commitment.

04.title: FORWARD-LOOKING REGULATORY INTELLIGENCE
04.description: Proactive monitoring of evolving global PV regulations to keep you future-ready. We track shifts across EMA, US FDA, MHRA, PMDA, TGA and emerging markets — translating complex regulatory changes into actionable compliance strategies before they impact your operations.

expertise.heading: Areas of Expertise
expertise.subtitle: Our consultants possess deep, hands-on experience across the full spectrum of pharmacovigilance and GxP disciplines.

qppv.title: QPPV Services
qppv.desc: EU-qualified QPPVs ensuring full compliance with pharmacovigilance legislation, adverse event oversight, and regulatory liaison.

gxp.title: GxP Auditing
gxp.desc: Comprehensive GCP, GLP, GMP, GCLP, and vendor qualification audits delivered on-site and remotely across global locations.

psmf.title: PSMF Management
psmf.desc: End-to-end Pharmacovigilance System Master File creation, maintenance, and regulatory alignment.

inspection.title: Inspection Readiness
inspection.desc: Mock inspections, gap analyses, and structured CAPA plans mirroring EMA, MHRA, and FDA inspection approaches.

signal.title: Signal Detection
signal.desc: Robust signal management frameworks, benefit-risk assessment support, and periodic safety report preparation.

regulatory.title: Regulatory Compliance
regulatory.desc: Strategic guidance across EU GVP, ICH, FDA 21 CFR, and WHO standards covering 20+ regulatory jurisdictions.

cta.heading: Ready to Strengthen organization’s PV Processes?
cta.text: Partner with PVCON for expert GxP auditing, Pharmacovigilance consulting, PVoI services and Regulatory compliance support.
